nasb.text: The thing itself will be carried to Assyria As tribute to King Jareb; Ephraim will be seized with shame And Israel will be ashamed of its own counsel.

esv.text: The thing itself shall be carried to Assyria as tribute to the great king. Ephraim shall be put to shame, and Israel shall be ashamed of his idol.

cnv.text: 人要把它帶到亞述去， 作貢物獻給那裡的大王。 以法蓮必受羞辱， 以色列必因自己的計謀蒙羞。

ccb.text: 它要被带到亚述去， 作为贡物献给强大的亚述王。 以法莲因此而受人嘲笑， 以色列因自己的偶像而蒙羞。
